header: Built for the way modern teams ship
subheadline: Three pillars that take you from raw data to confident decisions, without the spreadsheet sprawl.

items.title: Connect every source in minutes
items.description: Plug into your warehouse, CRM, and ad platforms with prebuilt connectors. Data syncs automatically, so analysts spend their time on answers instead of exports.

items.title: Model once, reuse everywhere
items.description: Define your core metrics in a shared semantic layer. Every chart, alert, and report draws from the same definitions, so revenue always means revenue.

items.title: Share insights people actually open
items.description: Push dashboards to Slack, email, or a public link with one click. Stakeholders see the numbers in the tools they already live in, updated in real time.
